entries.content: For spec/docs changes, add a drift assertion that the markdown mirror lists every JSON requirement ID. This catches stale human docs when spec.json gains requirements such as rq-titleBell01 or tool-title requirements.

Full test suites in ADV worktrees can expose stale tests that still expect source-checkout plugin paths even though deploy-local.sh now registers the stable runtime plugin path under `$HOME/.local/share/Advance/plugin`. Treat this as contract drift: align tests to runtime plugin path and keep source paths only for asset copy/build inputs.
